narrative:
West Chester Twp 13 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,222 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
